final_answer: Action may not proceed. The deviation closure (CLOSE-XOR-078) pertains to batch X-79, not the target batch X-78 specified in BATCH-XOR-078. Policy STD-XOR-078-P mandates an exact match for batch, assay, criterion, and date. The visible deviation DEV-XOR-078 remains unresolved for the target batch, thus the source boundary remains open.
open_blockers: Batch ID mismatch X-78 vs X-79
